detaileddescription.para: Resets allocated and deallocated memory information

briefdescription.para: Return the size of the memory.

detaileddescription.para:
Resizes memory to the given size
newSize

Allocates memory of given size and returns address in the memory
size
allocated memory size
address to allocated memory. If there is no available slot for such allocation, then -1 is returned

Deallocates memory in provided region
ptr
address of deallocated memory
size of deallocated memory or none if given address does not point to any allocated pieces of memory

Load bytes from provided address into the buffer of size n
addr
address in memory to load bytes
n
number of bytes to be loaded
Buffer of length N

Load string from address into buffer of size n
addr
address in memory to load bytes
n
number of bytes
string with data
Store integers at given address of the wasm memory

memberdef.argsstring: (sgns::runtime::WasmPointer addr, gsl::span< const uint8_t > value) override
memberdef.name: storeBuffer

briefdescription.para: allocates buffer in memory and copies value into memory

simplesect.para: full wasm pointer to allocated buffer

detaileddescription.para:
Finds memory segment of given size among deallocated pieces of memory and allocates a memory there
size
of target memory
address of memory of given size, or -1 if it is impossible to allocate this amount of memory

Finds memory segment of given size among deallocated pieces of memory
size
of target memory
address of memory of given size, or 0 if it is impossible to allocate this amount of memory

Resize memory and allocate memory segment of given size
size
memory size to be allocated
pointer to the allocated memory or 0 if it is impossible to allocate this amount of memory

Memory implementation for wasm environment Most code is taken from Binaryen's implementation here: https://github.com/WebAssembly/binaryen/blob/master/src/shell-interface.h#L37
Memory size of this implementation is at least of the size of one wasm page (4096 bytes)
